name: Parmesan-Basil Cream Sauce - Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, add fresh basil to 1 tablespoon of white wine.
2. Reduce the basil puree by half.
3. Add cream and reduce to a smooth consistency. Turn off heat.
4. Add Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Strain the sauce and reserve it. The sauce should have a medium consistency.
